choose.when: sq.expiry_date BETWEEN CURDATE() AND DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{query.warningDays} DAY)
choose.otherwise: (sq.expiry_date < CURDATE() OR sq.expiry_date BETWEEN CURDATE() AND DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{query.warningDays} DAY))

mapper.sql: (sq.expiry_date < CURDATE() OR sq.expiry_date BETWEEN CURDATE() AND DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{warningDays} DAY))
mapper.select:
SELECT sq.id, sq.supplier_id, s.name as supplier_name, s.credit_code, s.legal_representative, sq.type, sq.certificate_name, sq.license_number, sq.license_type, sq.issue_date, sq.expiry_date, sq.issuing_authority, s.registered_capital, s.registration_date, s.address, sq.attachment_name, sq.license_file, sq.status, sq.create_time, sq.update_time FROM supplier_qualification sq LEFT JOIN supplier s ON sq.supplier_id = s.id
AND sq.supplier_id = #{query.supplierId}
AND sq.type = #{query.type}
AND (sq.certificate_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.certificateName}, '%') OR s.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.certificateName}, '%'))
AND sq.license_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.licenseNumber}, '%')
AND s.credit_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.creditCode}, '%')
AND s.legal_representative LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.legalRepresentative}, '%')
AND sq.expiry_date < CURDATE()
AND sq.expiry_date BETWEEN CURDATE() AND DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 90 DAY)
AND sq.expiry_date > DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 90 DAY)
AND sq.expiry_date BETWEEN CURDATE() AND DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{query.warningDays} DAY)
ORDER BY sq.update_time DESC, sq.create_time DESC

SELECT sq.id, sq.supplier_id, s.name as supplier_name, s.credit_code, s.legal_representative, sq.type, sq.certificate_name, sq.license_number, sq.license_type, sq.issue_date, sq.expiry_date, sq.issuing_authority, s.registered_capital, s.registration_date, s.address, sq.attachment_name, sq.license_file, sq.status, sq.create_time, sq.update_time FROM supplier_qualification sq LEFT JOIN supplier s ON sq.supplier_id = s.id
AND sq.supplier_id = #{query.supplierId}
AND sq.type = #{query.type}
AND (sq.certificate_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.certificateName}, '%') OR s.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.certificateName}, '%'))
AND sq.license_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.licenseNumber}, '%')
AND s.credit_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.creditCode}, '%')
AND s.legal_representative LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.legalRepresentative}, '%')
AND
ORDER BY sq.expiry_date ASC, sq.update_time DESC, sq.create_time DESC

SELECT sq.id AS qualification_id, sq.supplier_id, s.name AS supplier_name, m.manufacturer, COUNT(DISTINCT m.id) AS product_count, sq.type, sq.certificate_name, sq.license_number, sq.expiry_date, sq.status FROM scm_material m INNER JOIN supplier_qualification sq ON m.qualification_id = sq.id LEFT JOIN supplier s ON sq.supplier_id = s.id
AND m.manufacturer IS NOT NULL AND m.manufacturer != ''
AND s.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.supplierName}, '%')
AND m.manufacturer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.manufacturer}, '%')
AND m.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.productName}, '%')
AND (sq.license_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.licenseNumber}, '%') OR m.registration_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.licenseNumber}, '%'))
AND
GROUP BY sq.id, sq.supplier_id, s.name, m.manufacturer, sq.type, sq.certificate_name, sq.license_number, sq.expiry_date, sq.status ORDER BY sq.expiry_date ASC, m.manufacturer ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM supplier_qualification sq WHERE
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.manufacturer) FROM scm_material m INNER JOIN supplier_qualification sq ON m.qualification_id = sq.id WHERE m.manufacturer IS NOT NULL AND m.manufacturer != '' AND
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM scm_material m INNER JOIN supplier_qualification sq ON m.qualification_id = sq.id WHERE
